case_title: DE OCAMPO VICENTE B. DR. VS ELLIS STREET GARAGE et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DE OCAMPO VICENTE B. DR. AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIS STREET GARAGE BROOKS WHITEHEAD INSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE OCAMPO VICENTE B. DR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLIS STREET GARAGE $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO JOHN ROLL (ELLIS ST. GARAGE) RETURNED SIGNED.
